title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cropin Asia Pacific Associates family as a Backend Developer in Amritsar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cropin Asia Pacific Associates:
Cropin Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cropin Asia Pacific Associates!
